evals.expected_output: Generates a Simple architecture: single index.html with window.Magic.fs.readFile/writeFile for persistence. Uses addEventListener for events. Includes add, toggle, delete functionality. Creates initial data/todos.json as empty array. No companion skill needed.

evals.prompt: 帮我做一个能自动分析CSV数据、生成可视化图表和文字报告的工具
evals.expected_output: Generates a Medium architecture: index.html with upload UI and results display, a companion workspace skill (e.g., data-analyzer) that handles multi-step analysis workflow. HTML uses setInputMessage to trigger skill, watchFile to monitor results. Skill writes status.json for progress and report.json for final output.

evals.prompt: 做一个内容创作工作台，可以让研究员搜集资料、写手写初稿、编辑做审核修改
evals.expected_output: Generates a Complex architecture with multi-agent dispatch: index.html as control panel with agent selector and task pipeline UI. Uses window.Magic.agent.getAgents() and window.Magic.project.createTopicAndSend() to dispatch to different agents. Includes companion skill for pipeline orchestration. Data layer tracks tasks, assignments, and outputs.

evals.prompt: Create an interactive AI chat interface with model selection and streaming output
evals.expected_output: Generates a Simple architecture: single HTML with window.Magic.llm.getModels() for model dropdown (auto as default), window.Magic.llm.stream for real-time output, cancel button using returned cancel function. All events via addEventListener. No companion skill needed.

evals.prompt: 做一个客户管理系统，能录入客户信息、自动生成跟进建议、定期提醒跟进
evals.expected_output: Generates a Medium architecture: index.html for CRUD UI and display, companion skill for generating follow-up suggestions using LLM. Data layer includes data/customers.json and data/reminders.json. HTML uses fs APIs for CRUD, setInputMessage to trigger AI-powered suggestion generation.

evals.prompt: Build a project management board where different AI agents handle different roles: PM plans tasks, developer implements, QA tests
evals.expected_output: Generates a Complex architecture: Kanban-style HTML dashboard, agent.getAgents() for role discovery, createTopicAndSend() for dispatching tasks to role-specific agents. Multiple companion skills or one orchestration skill. Data tracks task lifecycle across agents.

Generates a Simple architecture: single HTML with pure JavaScript calculator logic. No window.Magic APIs needed beyond basic rendering. Uses addEventListener for button clicks. No data persistence, no companion skill.
